title: Introducing Cursor for iOS
summary: Cursor has released an iOS app that enables developers to build code using always-on cloud agents or control agents running on their computer remotely. The app expands Cursor's platform beyond desktop development environments to mobile devices.
writeup: This video introduces Cursor for iOS, an app that brings the coding assistant to mobile devices. It covers two modes of operation: building code with always-on cloud agents, and remotely controlling agents that run on a developer's own computer. The release extends Cursor's platform past desktop development environments, allowing agent-driven work to continue from a phone.
